item.title: Huge shoutout to @Alec вАЬJuniorвАЭ who seriously came through for us рЯЩП We were stranded with a dead motorcycle battery, and he pulled up, helped us track down a new one, drove us around to grab what we needed, and even stuck with us late into the night just
item.description: Huge shoutout to @Alec вАЬJuniorвАЭ who seriously came through for us рЯЩП We were stranded with a dead motorcycle battery, and he pulled up, helped us track down a new one, drove us around to grab what we needed, and even stuck with us late into the night just

item.title: Teaching my backpack how to ride рЯ•ЇрЯЦ§ IвАЩm so proud of her she did so good!рЯУЄрЯПНпЄП It was her first time and sheвАЩs 5 feet tall and was determined to ride a sport bike. We made it happen LFG!! @madison.dy рЯЂґ вАҐ вАҐ #motorcycle #r6 #fyp #yamaha #r7 #r1 #bikelife #coup
